data.name: Hentai Age Vacation
data.detailed_description:
Step into a soothing and magical puzzle journey where each stage you clear unveils a breathtaking portrait of a beautiful girl. Immerse yourself in a calm, atmospheric experience as you position tiles to gradually reveal every image.

Play completely at your own rhythm—no countdowns, no pressure, just pure, relaxing gameplay. Whether you're a casual gamer or a puzzle lover, this game delivers captivating visuals and a gentle flow you can enjoy anytime.

Features :

Discover delightful artwork: Unlock fresh illustrations of charming girls as you advance.

Peaceful audio: Soft, relaxing background music enhances the tranquil mood.

Full-view gallery: Admire each finished picture in full once you complete the puzzle.

Continuous progression: Tackle countless stages with steadily rising difficulty.

No time restrictions: Enjoy each puzzle without any hurry or stress

data.short_description: A calm, magical puzzle game where each completed stage reveals a beautiful portrait. Arrange tiles at your own pace—no timers, no pressure—just relaxing gameplay with soothing visuals
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 捷克文*, 丹麥文*, 荷蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 希臘文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 繁體中文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1+ GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
